one_time_description: Drinking water settlement received during the year
economic_notes: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation (GBE) had revenue of $13,111,893 and income of $746,959. 274164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake (GBE) had revenue of $1,321,683 and a loss of $49,540. Golden Eagle Charitable Casino and Entertainment Centre is fully consolidated. CMHC mortgage commitment up to $2,032,000 for additional housing construction.
notes: Audit is qualified on two bases: (1) gaming revenue completeness cannot be verified due to lack of dual custody over cash and gaming cards; (2) tangible capital assets are not fully recognized as the First Nation has not gathered a complete inventory of major asset classes. The auditor firm name is not specifically identified — only listed as 'Chartered Professional Accountants' from Winnipeg, Manitoba. Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: Ozhushk-Onegaming Corporation and 274164 Ontario Limited o/a The Reef Store by the Lake. Three entities fully consolidated: Golden Eagle Casino and Charitable Entertainment Centre, Wauzhushk Onigum Foundation, and Kinew Day Care. Segmented expenses for childcare ($1,003,615) and Casino Rama ($624,960) not mapped to standard categories. Annual debt service reflects repayment of long-term debt per cash flow statement ($293,037). Net book value of assets under construction is $19,811,733 and is included in the $33,062,164 TCA figure.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
